Drill Through.description: The target suffers d3 mortal wounds.

Rivetin’ Dakka.description: During the Shooting phase, the attacking unit gets -1 to Hit rolls.

Shokk-boosta.description: For the rest of the battle: The unit gains the Re Roll Advance Characteristic Rolls ability. At making normal advance or fallback move:   -> The unit can move over non-Titanic models and terrain features as though they were not there.   -> The unit can move through enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of any enemy unit.   -> The unit automatically passes Desperate Escape tests.

Bomb Squig.description: Once per battle, the target suffers d3 mortal wounds.

Attached Unit.description: After being attached to a unit, the unit gains the Attached Unit Eligibility ability.

Trophy Hunters.description: You can re-roll the Charge roll.

Ramshackle Cover.description: This model has the Benefit of Cover.

Shoutin’ Pole (Aura).description: Against orks targets, for the rest of the battle, add 1 to the Leadership characteristic of friendly units within 6".

Boom Bomb.description: The target suffers d6 mortal wounds.

Ferocious Rage.description: Until the end of the turn, the unit's weapons gain [DEVASTATING WOUNDS].

Buzzer Squigs.description: During the Shooting phase, the target gains the Post Attack Debuff ability.

Squig Mine.description: Once per battle, the target suffers d6 mortal wounds.

Know-wotz.description: This model gains the Lone Operative ability.

Shokk Tunnel.description: When the unit is selected to Advance, until the end of the turn, unless while an enemy unit is within 9", this model has the Deep Strike ability; this model gains the Counts As Advanced This Turn ability.

Deranged Snotling Assault.description: During the Shooting phase, enemy units nearby must take a Battle-shock test.

Grot Assistant.description: Once per battle, the unit gains the Once Per Battle Special ability.

Single-minded Predator.description: You can use the Fire Overwatch or Heroic Stratagem on this model for 0CP.

Thundering Stampede.description: While this model leads a unit, for the rest of the battle, the unit gets +1 to Charge rolls.

Billowing Fumes (Aura).description: The attacking unit gets -1 to Hit rolls.

Gargantuan.description: This model can move over terrain features as though they were not there.

Walking Bastion.description: During the Shooting phase, ignore engagement penalty this model's Hit rolls.

Burna Bomb.description: Roll one D6 for each model in the target unit: for each 6+, the target suffers 1 mortal wound.

Galatus Shield.description: During the Fight phase, the attacking unit gets -1 to Wound rolls.

Unyielding Ancient.description: This model is set up again with full wounds remaining.

Deft Parry.description: During the Fight phase, the attacking unit gets -1 to Hit rolls.

Saturation Volleys.description: During the Shooting phase, the attacking unit gets -1 to Hit rolls.

Corner the Quarry.description: Enemy units nearby cannot Fall Back.

Daughter of the Abyss.description: The unit has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability.

Seeker’s Instincts.description: After being attached to a unit, friendly units nearby get +2 to Charge rolls.

Self Repair.description: This model regains up to 1 lost wound.

Tactical Perception.description: After being attached to a unit, the unit has the Fights First ability.

Tenacious Spirit.description: While the unit is below its starting strength, while the unit is below half strength, after being attached to a unit:   -> The unit gets +1 to Hit rolls.   -> The unit gets +1 to Wound rolls.

Implacable Vanguard.description: During the Shooting phase, until the end of the turn, the unit gains the Once Per Battle Special ability.

Jetbike Outriders.description: After being attached to a unit, the unit gains the Attached Unit Eligibility ability.

Assault Ramp.description: Units can disembark from this model after it has made a Normal move, and are still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Living Fortress.description: Until the end of the phase, the unit has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

Merciless Hunter.description: During the Shooting phase, while the unit is below half strength, the unit gets +1 to Wound rolls.

Golden Laurels.description: During the Fight phase, after being attached to a unit, subtract 1 from the attacking unit's Armour Penetration characteristic.

Hero of Lion’s Gate.description: Once per battle, this model can change Any rolls to a 6.

Jump Packs.description: This model gains the Cannot Embark Venerable Land Raider ability.

Strike from the Skies.description: The unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Tarsis buckler.description: Modify this model's Wounds characteristic to 4.
